urlset:
https://benjimanclarke.ie/ weekly 1.0
https://benjimanclarke.ie/aboutben monthly 0.8
https://benjimanclarke.ie/career monthly 0.8
https://benjimanclarke.ie/contact monthly 0.5
https://benjimanclarke.ie/projects monthly 0.7
https://benjimanclarke.ie/blog weekly 0.9
{% for post in posts %}
https://benjimanclarke.ie/blogs/{{ post.slug }}/ {{ post.date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') if post.date else '2026-03-02' }} monthly 0.6
{% endfor %}
